# demystifyopenclaw


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

This file will become your README and also the index of your
documentation.

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install demystifyopenclaw in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure demystifyopenclaw package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to demystifyopenclaw
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/ninjalabo/demystifyopenclaw):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/ninjalabo/demystifyopenclaw.git
```

or from [conda](https://anaconda.org/ninjalabo/demystifyopenclaw)

``` sh
$ conda install -c ninjalabo demystifyopenclaw
```

or from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/demystifyopenclaw/)

``` sh
$ pip install demystifyopenclaw
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/ninjalabo/demystifyopenclaw)’s
[pages](https://ninjalabo.github.io/demystifyopenclaw/). Additionally
you can find package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/ninjalabo/demystifyopenclaw) and
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/demystifyopenclaw/) respectively.
